name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32)
description: Comprehensive personality assessment measuring 32 workplace behavior characteristics. Predicts performance, identifies leadership potential, and assesses cultural fit across all job levels.

name: SHL Verify G+ (General Ability)
description: Comprehensive cognitive ability test combining numerical, deductive, and inductive reasoning. Measures general mental ability and potential to learn and adapt in the workplace.

name: SHL Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to interpret and analyze numerical data including tables, graphs, and statistics. Essential for roles requiring data-driven decision making.

name: SHL Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures ability to understand and evaluate written information, draw logical conclusions from text passages. Critical for roles requiring strong communication and comprehension.

name: SHL Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Evaluates logical thinking and ability to draw conclusions from given premises. Tests structured problem-solving ability essential for analytical roles.

name: SHL Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify patterns and conceptual thinking using abstract and diagrammatic information. Assesses innovative thinking capability.

name: Motivational Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Assesses factors that drive and motivate individuals in the workplace. Identifies what energizes or demotivates employees for better job-person fit.

name: Graduate Situational Judgment Test
description: Realistic work scenarios designed for graduate and entry-level candidates. Evaluates judgment, decision-making, and interpersonal skills in workplace situations.

name: Manager Situational Judgment Test
description: Assesses managerial judgment through realistic leadership scenarios. Evaluates delegation, conflict resolution, team management, and strategic thinking.

name: SHL Coding Simulations
description: AI-powered coding assessment supporting 50+ programming languages. Candidates write, run, and test code in a realistic IDE environment. Evaluates logic, accuracy, and best practices.

name: SHL Technical Skills Assessments
description: Comprehensive suite of IT and technical knowledge assessments covering frameworks, databases, cloud platforms, and more.

name: SHL Business Skills Assessments
description: Assessments for Microsoft Office proficiency, data entry accuracy, typing speed, and administrative task performance.

name: SHL Call Center Simulations
description: Interactive simulations that replicate real customer service environments. Assesses multitasking, communication, problem resolution, and customer empathy.

name: SHL Language Evaluation
description: AI-powered assessment of verbal and written language proficiency. Evaluates grammar, vocabulary, fluency, and comprehension for multilingual roles.

name: SHL 360-Degree Feedback
description: Multi-rater feedback tool for comprehensive performance evaluation. Gathers input from managers, peers, direct reports, and self for leadership development.

name: Global Skills Development Report
description: Comprehensive development report identifying strengths, development areas, and personalized action plans based on assessment results.

name: Account Manager Solution
description: Job-focused assessment for Account Manager roles. Evaluates sales aptitude, relationship building, negotiation, and client management capabilities.

name: Administrative Professional - Short Form
description: Streamlined assessment for administrative and office professional roles. Evaluates organizational skills, attention to detail, and office management abilities.

name: Branch Manager - Short Form
description: Assessment designed for branch and retail management roles. Evaluates leadership, operations management, customer focus, and team development skills.

name: Cashier Solution
description: Role-specific assessment for cashier and retail positions. Evaluates customer service orientation, accuracy, speed, and basic numeracy.

name: Bank Administrative Assistant - Short Form
description: Tailored assessment for banking administrative roles. Evaluates financial literacy, attention to detail, regulatory awareness, and client communication.

name: Bank Collections Agent - Short Form
description: Assessment for collections and recovery roles in banking. Evaluates negotiation, persistence, empathy, and compliance awareness.

name: Agency Manager Solution
description: Assessment for insurance and agency management roles. Evaluates leadership, business development, team management, and strategic planning.

name: Apprentice 8.0 Job Focused Assessment
description: Entry-level assessment designed for apprenticeship programs. Evaluates learning potential, basic aptitude, work ethic, and trainability.

name: Bank Operations Supervisor - Short Form
description: Assessment for banking operations supervisory roles. Evaluates process management, team supervision, quality control, and operational efficiency.

name: Bookkeeping, Accounting, Auditing Clerk Short Form
description: Assessment for financial record-keeping roles. Evaluates accounting knowledge, attention to detail, numerical accuracy, and compliance awareness.

name: Job-Focused Assessments (JFA)
description: Curated assessment bundles combining cognitive, personality, and behavioral measures tailored to specific job families. Available for hundreds of roles across industries.

name: SHL Video Interview
description: AI-powered video interviewing platform for structured candidate screening. Analyzes verbal responses for competency alignment and provides standardized evaluation.

name: SHL Mechanical Comprehension Test
description: Assesses understanding of mechanical and physical principles. Essential for engineering, manufacturing, and technical trade roles.

name: SHL Checking Test (Attention to Detail)
description: Measures speed and accuracy in checking and comparing information. Critical for roles requiring high attention to detail and data accuracy.

name: SHL Reading Comprehension Test
description: Evaluates ability to read and understand written materials quickly and accurately. Suitable for roles requiring document processing and information extraction.

name: SHL Calculation Test
description: Tests basic arithmetic and mathematical calculation ability. Designed for roles requiring everyday numerical computation skills.

name: Universal Competency Framework (UCF) Assessments
description: Assessments mapped to SHL's Universal Competency Framework covering 8 competency domains and 20 competencies. Provides standardized evaluation across roles.

name: .NET Framework 4.5 Assessment
description: Technical knowledge assessment for .NET Framework 4.5 proficiency. Tests C#, ASP.NET, Entity Framework, and related Microsoft technology skills.

name: Accounts Payable Assessment
description: Assesses knowledge and skills for accounts payable roles including invoice processing, payment management, and vendor relations.

name: Accounts Receivable Assessment
description: Tests competency in accounts receivable processes including billing, collections, credit management, and revenue tracking.

name: Bilingual Spanish Reservation Agent Solution
description: Bilingual assessment for reservation and booking agent roles. Evaluates customer service, language proficiency, multitasking, and booking system aptitude.
